title: 5 Pcs Luggage Tags, Aluminium Suitcase Tags with Steel Loop and Waterproof Name ID Card for Travel Bag, Checked Luggage, Suitcases, Laptop Bags, Backpacks (7.5 x 4.5 cm, 5 Colours)
features: ✈️【Bright colours and unique patterns】The luggage tags for suitcases has 5 different colours: Red, Blue, Black, Gold, purple. Also had an aeroplane pattern on the luggage etiquette. It can help you identify your luggage immediately and save time.

✈️【High Quality Material】Airplane travel suitcase tags is made of aluminum alloy, strong and sturdy, not easy to bend. Durable and reusable. Dimension: about 7.5 * 4.5 cm/ 2.95 * 1.77 Inches. Small size, light weight, easy to carry, to offer you more convenience during travel.

✈️【Easy to use】The screw connector cable can connect your card safely, so it will not fall off, very safe and reliable. To display your detailed information, the screw connector must be unlocked and removed from the luggage labels for suitcases, which can protect your privacy well.

✈️【Easy to identify】Note your information on the aluminium suitcase tags, including name, phone number, address and email information to easily identify your luggage and avoid lost luggage. Less time at the airport waiting for luggage and more time to enjoy your holiday.

✈️【Widely Used】The cruise luggage tag holder is suitable for men, women and children travelling by plane or cruise ship. Perfect for any hand luggage, suitcase, purse, laptop bag, school bag, backpack, golf bag, sports bag, briefcase or duffel bag, It is also a good choice to gift to family or friends.
